サン.sentence: <ruby>富士山<rt>ふじさん</rt></ruby>は日本一だ。

た.translation: Rice is grown in the field.
The field is full of water.

デン.sentence: <ruby>田園<rt>でんえん</rt></ruby>風景が好きだ。

つき.translation: I look at the moon at night.

スイ.sentence: <ruby>水道水<rt>すいどうみず</rt></ruby>は安全だ。

モク.sentence: <ruby>木曜日<rt>もくようび</rt></ruby>は忙しい。

もも.translation: I pick up a hundred yen.

ヒャク.translation: I go to the department store.

うえ.translation: There’s a book on the desk.

した.translation: There’s a cat under the desk.

チュウ.translation: I go to junior high school.

なか.ば.translation: I read halfway through the book.

ハン.translation: I buy it at half price.

ジョ.translation: I go to a girls’ school.

ジ.translation: I go to the ENT clinic.

カ.translation: How many times do you go?

まえ.translation: There’s a car in front of the house.

ガイ.translation: I go to a foreign country.

サ.translation: I sit on the left side.

ナン.translation: I go to the South Pole.

ギョ.translation: I go to the fish market.

おお.きい.translation: I live in a big house.

ソウ.translation: I wake up early in the morning.

バイ.translation: I go to the purchasing department.

やす.む.translation: I take a break from school.

とき.translation: I come at a good time.

テン.translation: I walk through the shopping street.

そら.translation: I look up at the sky.
